gt_sql: SELECT T1.time FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2008 AND T1.time LIKE '_:%:__.___'
pred_sql:
SELECT r.time
FROM races ra
JOIN results r ON ra.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE ra.year = 2008 
  AND ra.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix'
  AND r.position = 1;
question: Who is the champion of the Canadian Grand Prix in 2008? Indicate his finish time.
